title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
optimized_headline: STADLER's Innovative Approach Transforms 230-Year-Old Company’s Knowledge Work
raw_excerpt: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
raw_body: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
speedrun: STADLER, a 230-year-old company, is leveraging ChatGPT to enhance knowledge work among its 650 employees. This integration aims to save time and boost productivity significantly. By utilizing AI tools, STADLER is modernizing its operations, which is crucial in today's fast-paced business environment. This shift not only improves efficiency but also positions the company to adapt to changing market demands.
why_it_matters: Employees at STADLER could experience immediate time savings, allowing them to focus on more strategic tasks rather than routine work.
This move reflects a broader trend in industries adopting AI to streamline processes, indicating a shift towards more tech-driven workplaces.

lenses.eli12: STADLER is using ChatGPT to help its workers do their jobs faster and better. Imagine having a smart assistant that takes care of repetitive tasks, freeing you up for more important work. This change matters because it shows how even long-standing companies can adapt to new technologies for better efficiency.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, STADLER's use of ChatGPT highlights a growing user need for tools that enhance productivity. By reducing the time spent on mundane tasks, companies can reallocate resources to innovation and customer engagement. This could lead to improved product offerings and a competitive edge in the market.
lenses.engineer: From a technical perspective, STADLER's integration of ChatGPT into its workflows suggests a focus on natural language processing capabilities to streamline knowledge work. This could involve using specific models optimized for task automation and information retrieval. Such implementations could set benchmarks for efficiency in similar organizations, paving the way for broader AI applications.
